values: Order-to-Cash Intelligence Platform  |  Euronext Growth: ALBFR.PA  |  FY2025 base  |  May 2026
GOS incl. CIR per Stat. Report p.5

1. DCF: 5-year projection (2026-2030) × 3 scenarios (Bear/Base/Bull). EBITDA margin: linear interpolation FY25→2030 target. FCF = EBIT×(1−t) + D&A − Capex − ΔBFR. Mid-year discounting. Terminal Value: Gordon Growth (primary). Exit multiple cross-check (15× EBITDA).
2. CIR (Crédit Impôt Recherche): €3.5m/yr flat included in EBITDA for 2026-2030. FY25 actual: €3.482m. Risk sensitivity documented in Caveats tab.
3. Net debt: strict basis = gross financial debt €31.0m − cash+securities €16.3m = €14.7m. No adjustments for deferred revenue, earn-outs, or operating leases.
4. Trading comps: EV/Sales and EV/EBITDA on FY2026E estimates for BlackLine, BILL, nCino, Workiva. EUR-translated at 1.10 USD/EUR. Esker shown as reference (delisted).
5. Transaction comps: Esker, Coupa, Billtrust, Pagero, Bottomline. All include control premium (30-50%); not directly comparable to stand-alone DCF/trading EV.
6. LBO: simplified affordability model. All unlevered FCF applied to debt repayment. Exit at 15× EBITDA yr 5. Entry leverage 35%. IRR = equity return (MoM^(1/5)−1).
7. Margin path: point estimate = linear. Front-loaded and back-loaded paths computed in Margin_path tab. EV spread vs. linear: ±3-5%.

8. Sources: Statutory Report 31-Dec-2025 (KPMG/Yuma Audit, 21-Apr-2026), Press Release FY2025 (30-Mar-2026), O2C Intelligence 2030 Press Release (07-Apr-2026). All FY25 numbers reconciled to statutory accounts.
SIDETRADE — INPUT ASSUMPTIONS  (single source of truth — all tabs point here)
Blue cells = hardcoded inputs  |  Black cells = formulas  |  Green cells = cross-sheet links

Linear interp: margin_t = anchor + (target − anchor) × t/5. Year 1=2026, year 5=2030.

FY25 actual: 1.121/61.4=1.8% → rounded to 2.0%. Stable; GPU capex adds to D&A from 2027.

FY25 actual: 1.7%. Bear elevated for GPU ramp (O2C2030 plan: ~€4.1m cumulative GPU capex over 5yr).
FY25 normalized: ~7% of ΔRev (ex-CIR timing). Bear higher for slower collections on new clients.
CIR (Crédit Impôt Recherche) — annual flat included in EBITDA (€m)
FY25: €3.482m. Flat assumption per management R&D investment trajectory. *** See Caveats tab ***
SaaS small-cap France. Rf ~3.5%, ERP ~6%, levered beta 1.1-1.3, +size prem. Bear: higher risk prem.
